/**
 * A dictionary for date string (date only, no time).
 * 
 * Dates are numbered from 0000-1-1 -- 0 for "0000-1-1", 1 for "0000-1-2", 2 for "0000-1-3" and
 * up to 3652426 for "9999-12-31".
 * 
 * Note the implementation is not thread-safe.
 * 
 * @author yangli9
 */
